heading: Procedure
body:
To view a MongoDB Vector Search index for a collection using [mongosh](mongodb-shell),
perform the following steps:

To learn more, see [MongoDB Shell](connect-mongo-shell).

The [db.collection.getSearchIndexes()](manual/reference/method/db.collection.getSearchIndexes) method has the
following syntax:

```shell
db.<collectionName>.getSearchIndexes( "<index-name>" );
```
